questions.question: Explain the difference between permutations with identical objects and combinations with repetition
keyPoints: Identical permutations: Arrangements where swapping identical elements doesn't create new permutation
Combinations with repetition: Selecting items allowing multiple picks of same type

questions.question: Prove that the number of non-negative integer solutions to x₁ + x₂ + ... + xₙ = r is C(r+n-1, r)
keyPoints: Count distinct arrangements of stars and dividers
